case_title: SMALL, CHARLES E. VS SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMALL, CHARLES E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,520.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT AGENCY AND I FILED A CLAIM WITH THE AGENCY. MY CLAIM WAS DENIED BY THE AGENCY.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SMALL, CHARLES E. AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-03-2001 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-03-2001, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-18-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 SCHEDULING CONFLICT.
